calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Confirmation Of Transfer To Nevada
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Case Transferred

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der, via Zoom, for Brian Wong, Trustee.

The court confirms with Mr. Der that the Nevada attorney has advises him that matter will be under supervision of the Nevada court. Mr. Der and the court discuss the issue of notice to the CA Department of Mental Health has been merged with the Department of Health Care Services, who has been provided notice.

The Accounting Petition is taken under submission. A Status of Confirmation of Transfer to Nevada is set for Jul-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a brief report regarding status of the transfer by Jul-12-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees

Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Continued To Feb-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Continued To Nov-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-13-2021 Continued To Oct-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der, via ZOOM, for Brian Wong, Executor.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding this matter. Counsel reports that he is still working with Nevada counsel regarding transferring this case to Nevada. The court advises counsel that it may request either an amended petition or a petition to terminate and that the court is not inclined to transfer the case without first receiving clarification or confirmation that the Nevada court is willing to accept supervision of this trust. Mr. Der offers oral testimony in support of transferring this matter to Nevada which is where the Trustee and Conservatee currently reside. Mr. Der confirms that he will continue to work with the Nevada attorney to determine the best method to establish a special needs trust in Nevada.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to October 12, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Continued To Jul-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der, via ZOOM, counsel for Brian Wong, Trustee.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that it is not feel comfortable with this trust matter being unsupervised if transferred to Nevada. Counsel advises that Nevada does not typically offer court supervision for trust matters but typically, does offer court supervision of the trust instead. Regardless, the court advises counsel that it does not feel comfortable terminating supervision of the trust until there is confirmation from the Nevada court regarding supervision of the trust if the petition to transfer is granted and advises counsel that he should consider amending his petition accordingly.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to July 13, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
